research_question: Can a low-turnover low-asset-growth satellite improve an 80 percent QQQ core after costs?
null_hypothesis: The frozen portfolio does not improve net return and risk-adjusted performance versus QQQ.

point_in_time.universe: Top 50 equity positions in each disclosed QQQ N-PORT report, mapped by the frozen CUSIP snapshot.
point_in_time.formation_event: One event per report; execute at the first QQQ close strictly after the SEC accepted_at calendar date.
point_in_time.fundamental_availability: Use only annual Assets rows with available_at strictly before the execution date.
point_in_time.revision_rule: For each taxonomy, concept, unit, and fiscal end, use the latest filed accession already available at that execution date.
point_in_time.pair_rule: Within one taxonomy/concept/unit, choose the pair with the latest current fiscal end and a prior fiscal end 300 to 430 days earlier; require both values positive.
point_in_time.same_day_rule: A filing dated on the execution date is unavailable until a later session.
point_in_time.missing_rule: No imputation. A held name without a new price carries its last observable value as cash-equivalent until rebalance; no future backfill.

feature.name: ANNUAL_ASSET_GROWTH
feature.formula: current annual Assets / previous annual Assets - 1

portfolio.rebalance: At each frozen QQQ N-PORT formation event.

costs.turnover: Half the absolute target-versus-pretrade weight change, including cash; initial entry is charged but excluded from the annual satellite turnover gate.

splits.holdout_open_rule: Open exactly once only if every discovery gate passes.
splits.purge: No holding interval or forward-return diagnostic may cross from discovery into holdout.

items: Tie-aware quarterly RankIC against next holding-period stock return.
Signal decay at one holding period.

bootstrap.series: Monthly strategy return minus monthly QQQ return.
bootstrap.method: Circular moving-block bootstrap of the arithmetic mean.

stop_rules.input_failure: INPUT_BLOCKED; do not access strategy outcomes.
stop_rules.discovery_failure: REJECTED; permanently close this identity without opening holdout.
forbidden_after_outcomes: New factors, regimes, timing, machine learning, or optimizer.
A second formal run under this identity.
